---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the simulation, server, or clients misbehaves
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the wrong behavior.

## What you expected

What should have happened instead.

## Reproduction

Steps, a seed, or a playtest/snapshot that triggers it. Bunnyland is
deterministic given a seed — please include one if you can.

```
# command(s), seed, or world generator used
```

## Environment

- bunnyland-server version / commit:
- Python version:
- Relevant extras installed (discord, llm, chroma, otel, server, tui):
- Provider / model, if LLM-related:

## Evidence

Stack traces, `rejected(...)` reason strings, logs, or trace artifacts. Paste the
actual output rather than describing it.

## Automation (optional)

- [ ] A bot or agent generated or assisted with this report. Noting it is a
      tracing courtesy that helps reproduce the run — it does not change how the
      report is weighed.
